title: CallGraphSchema
description: Standardized schema for storing and validating binary call graph caller-callee networks

items.description: Unique identifiers (human-readable function name or entry point address).

caller.description: Function name or entry point of the parent caller.

callee.description: Function name or entry point of the target subprogram invocation.

site_address.description: Exact virtual address corresponding to the branch/call instruction.
